text: STM32H753VIT6 Flight Controller Parameter Value Core Cortex-M7 @ 480MHz (856 DMIPS) Flash 2MB (dual-bank for safe OTA) RAM 1MB + 1MB TCM (zero-wait) IMU Interface 4x SPI @ 80MHz Safety ECC on Flash, parity on SRAM Qualification AEC-Q100 Grade 2 (-40°C to 105°C) Redundancy architecture: Three IMUs connected via separate SPI buses with voting at 1kHz: • IMU1: Bosch BMI088 (accel+gyro) – SPI bus 1 • IMU2: ADIS16470 (tactical grade) – SPI bus 2 • IMU3: TDK ICM-42688-P – SPI bus 3 If any IMU deviates >3 sigma, it is excluded within 1ms.
